steps.title: Identify the antecedent
steps.content: The blank is a possessive modifying "compelling narrative." The thing that owns the narrative is The Poem of the Cid — a single poem (singular). So we need a singular possessive pronoun, not a plural one and not a contraction.

steps.title: Apply the rule
steps.content:
its = singular possessive ("its narrative"). it's = "it is" (contraction, wrong). their/they're = plural (wrong antecedent number).

That matches choice B — B is correct.
